articles.title: How to Create a Chatbot Knowledge Base: Setup & Training Guide
articles.description: Learn how to build an AI chatbot knowledge base that actually works. Step-by-step content preparation, setup, and testing for non-technical business owners.

articles.title: How to Write Chatbot Scripts and AI Instructions That Work
articles.description: Learn how to write effective chatbot scripts and instructions using the role-to-escalation framework. Includes before/after examples and research insights.

articles.title: AI Chatbot vs. Live Chat: Which Is Better for Your Business?
articles.description: Surveys show customers prefer humans, yet 67% choose chatbots when available. Here's the data-backed framework to decide which approach fits your needs.

articles.title: What Is an AI Chatbot? Definition, Types & How They Work
articles.description: Learn what AI chatbots are, how they work using NLP and machine learning, what they're used for, and how to choose the right type for your website.

articles.title: Chatbot Statistics: AI Chatbot Market Size, Usage & Future Trends
articles.description: Discover the latest chatbot statistics for 2025–2026: market size, adoption rates, AI traffic share, customer service costs, ROI data, and industry trends.

articles.title: Chatbot Pros and Cons: An Honest Assessment for SMBs
articles.description: Real data on chatbot benefits and drawbacks: costs, failure rates, customer sentiment, and what separates effective deployments from wasted budgets.
